####  December 5, 2023 
#  Multi-unit operator opens 400th StretchLab studio
Terry Rackley just opened his seventh StretchLab studio, which is the 400th studio opened and a milestone for the assisted stretching brand.
Read the full article [here](https://www.franchising.com/articles/multiunit_operator_opens_400th_stretchlab_studio.html).
